bdsa_case_id.title: BDSA ID
bdsa_case_id.description: Unique BDSA case identifier of specified format: "BDSA-01-0001", where 01 is the BDSA institution ID, and 0001 is the BDSA case ID within the institution.

block_id.title: Block ID
block_id.description: Unique institutional block identifier, can be any format.
